query:
SELECT e.id as est_id, e.menuSlug, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = e.id) as cat_count,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE establishmentId = e.id) as prod_count
FROM establishments e WHERE e.menuSlug = 'burger-house-admin';
